hooks.command: echo '=== Godot Quality Gate ===' && echo -n '[GDScript lint]  ' && (gdlint $(find . -name '*.gd' -not -path './.godot/*' 2>/dev/null) 2>&1 | grep -c 'error' || echo 0) | xargs -I{} sh -c 'test {} -eq 0 && echo PASS || echo FAIL ({} errors)' && echo -n '[GDScript format] ' && (gdformat --check $(find . -name '*.gd' -not -path './.godot/*' 2>/dev/null) 2>&1 | grep -c 'would reformat' || echo 0) | xargs -I{} sh -c 'test {} -eq 0 && echo PASS || echo FAIL ({} files need reformat)' && echo -n '[Python tooling]  ' && (uv run ruff check . --quiet 2>&1 | wc -l | xargs -I{} sh -c 'test {} -eq 0 && echo PASS || echo FAIL') 2>/dev/null || true

echo '\n=== Session Quality Summary ===' && echo -n 'GDScript lint:    ' && (gdlint $(find . -name '*.gd' -not -path './.godot/*' 2>/dev/null) 2>&1 | grep -c 'error' 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A') && echo -n 'GDScript format:  ' && (gdformat --check $(find . -name '*.gd' -not -path './.godot/*' 2>/dev/null) 2>&1 | tail -1 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A') && echo 'Run /quality for full scored report.' 2>/dev/null || true
